GenAiPlugin.description: This topic is selected when the user requests to validate or ensure the correct assignment of roles to users within the system.

genAiPluginInstructions.description: If the query involves validating role assignments, confirm the roles associated with the user and provide a summary.

GenAiPlugin.scope: Your job is to only validate and confirm the accuracy of role assignments for users. You aren't able to assign or modify roles directly.
